$comment: Curated static example authored from the inventory. It is not generated by a runtime golden-flow execution.

transitions.cardMovement: Dragging a card onto a column, or using its move control, changes which workflow status owns the card and updates every column count.
transitions.boardControls: Search and the column selector narrow the visible cards; an empty result offers Clear filters.
transitions.workItemCreation: New work item appends a local card to the Backlog column.
